repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §1 Q1 residualized-score geometry gives adjacent projection algebra, not network-interference procedure equivalence

published_prior_art.cite: Leung2022ANI proves ANI exposure-IPW consistency with network HAC; it does not state the oracle equality with NCR and design-orbit RT covariance

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure_v1 gives finite shared-completion partial-ID bounds, not an asymptotic ANI/NCR/RT equivalence frontier; doc/API.md §1 is panel FWL only

published_prior_art.cite: Leung2022ANI, Leung2023NCRI, BasseDingFellerToulis2024, GaoDing2025Network, PuelzBasseFellerToulis2022, WeinsteinNevo2026 each cover one procedure family or misspecification axis, not the joint Delta_eta frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure_v1 has shared-completion bounds but no open-class separation among ANI point functionals, NCR covariance, and RT covariance

published_prior_art.cite: BasseDingFellerToulis2024 and PuelzBasseFellerToulis2022 target randomization-test validity; WeinsteinNevo2026 targets network-misspecification bias, not three-procedure open-class separation

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Make the finite program Delta_eta more operational by specifying its dimension and constraint class for one canonical exposure summary S_r and one canonical design-orbit family.
Add a boundary corollary separating Delta_eta^P=0, Delta_eta^V>0 from Delta_eta^P>0, so the point-functional versus covariance-only frontier is visible before the full strict-separation conjecture.

Include the 2026 misspecified-exposure partial-identification line as a non-load-bearing comparison if it becomes published, since it is close on exposure misspecification even though not on ANI/NCR/RT equivalence.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 with Conjecture 1 as the flagship kernel and use Conjecture 2 as the non-equivalence branch.
